_note: Illustrative educational frameworks, NOT prescriptions. Allocation ranges are common starting points cited in general financial education. Percentages are midpoints of the ranges in corpus/education/06-risk-profiles.md. For grounding tool/agent logic; always framed as descriptive, never as advice.

conservative.summary: Prioritises capital protection; low tolerance for swings; shorter horizon.

moderate.summary: Balances growth and stability; medium tolerance; medium-to-long horizon.

aggressive.summary: Maximises long-term growth; high tolerance; long horizon.
